name: GitHub
description: Send authenticated requests to the GitHub REST API for repositories, contents, issues, pull requests, search, and user resources.

actions.name: GitHub API Request
actions.description: Call any GitHub REST API endpoint with a raw HTTP configuration.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL starting with https://api.github.com/

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

body.description: Optional JSON body for POST, PUT, PATCH, or DELETE requests.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Authenticated User
actions.description: Get the GitHub user for the current OAuth connection.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL for the authenticated user endpoint.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List User Repositories
actions.description: List repositories visible to the authenticated user.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL for listing user repositories.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

visibility.description: Limit results to repositories with the selected visibility.

affiliation.description: Comma-separated list of values. Can include: owner, collaborator, organization_member, enterprise_member, admin.

type.description: Legacy repository type filter. Prefer visibility and affiliation for modern filtering.

queryParams.description: Optional query parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Repository
actions.description: Get a repository by owner and repo.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Repository
actions.description: Create a repository for the authenticated user.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL for creating a user repository.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

private.description: Whether the repository is private. Defaults to false for public repositories.

auto_init.description: Create an initial commit with an empty README.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Get Repository Contents
actions.description: Get file or directory contents from a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

ref.description: The name of the commit/branch/tag. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Or Update File
actions.description: Create a new file or update an existing file in a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Contents URL for the target file.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

content.description: New file contents encoded as Base64.

sha.description: Required when updating an existing file. The blob SHA of the file to replace.

branch.description: Branch name to write to. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

committer.description: Optional committer identity object. If provided, include name and email.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

author.description: Optional author identity object. If provided, include name and email.

body.description: Create or update file request body. Updating an existing file requires sha. Writing under .github/workflows may also require the workflow OAuth scope in addition to repo.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Delete File
actions.description: Delete a file from a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Contents URL for the target file.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

sha.description: Blob SHA of the file being deleted.

branch.description: Branch name to delete from. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

committer.description: Optional committer identity object. If provided, include name and email.

name.description: Display name for the commit identity.

email.description: Email address for the commit identity.

author.description: Optional author identity object. If provided, include name and email.

body.description: Delete file request body. Deleting under .github/workflows may also require the workflow OAuth scope in addition to repo.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List Issues
actions.description: List issues for a repository. Read assignee data from the assignees array rather than depending on the older singular assignee field.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

state.description: Filter by state. Defaults to open.

since.description: Only show issues updated at or after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

queryParams.description: Optional query string parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Issue
actions.description: Create a new issue in a repository. GitHub issue responses should be read from the assignees array rather than depending on the older singular assignee field.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: List Pull Requests
actions.description: List pull requests for a repository.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Pull requests URL for the repository.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

state.description: Filter by state. Defaults to open.

head.description: Filter by head user or head organization and branch name.

queryParams.description: Optional query string parameters for filtering and pagination.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

actions.name: Create Pull Request
actions.description: Create a pull request in a repository. Avoid depending on deprecated null placeholder response fields and instead read the documented current response shape.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Pull requests URL for the repository.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

title.description: Pull request title. Required unless issue is provided.

issue.description: Optional existing issue number to convert into a pull request. If provided, title may be omitted.

head.description: Name of the branch where your changes are implemented.

base.description: Name of the branch you want the changes pulled into.

head_repo.description: Optional head repository name when both branches are in organizations owned by the same user or org.

draft.description: Whether to open the pull request as a draft.

maintainer_can_modify.description: Allow maintainers to modify the pull request branch.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL for searching repositories.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

actions.name: Get Rate Limits
actions.description: Get the current rate limit status for the authenticated user. Prefer the resources object, especially resources.core, instead of depending on deprecated top-level rate fields.

connectionId.description: Connection id for the authorized GitHub account

method.description: HTTP method for the GitHub API call.

url.description: Full GitHub API URL for rate limit status.

Accept.description: GitHub media type header. Use application/vnd.github+json for the current stable API.

X-GitHub-Api-Version.description: GitHub REST API version header. 2022-11-28 is the current stable version recommended for production.

User-Agent.description: Valid User-Agent header for GitHub API requests, for example Zaprun-GitHub-Plugin. Required by GitHub.

headers.description: HTTP headers for the GitHub API request. Authorization is injected automatically from the connection. Include Accept, X-GitHub-Api-Version, and User-Agent.

outputSchema.description: Raw JSON response body returned by the GitHub API.
